     The Numbers Business Report

The Lego Ninjago Movie (2017)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,281,555Details
International Box Office $64,400,000
Worldwide Box Office $123,681,555
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $3,675,753
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $13,225,870
Total $16,901,623
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The battle for Ninjago City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, who are all secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat evil warlord Garmadon, the Worst Guy Ever, who also happens to be Lloyd’s dad. Pitting mech against mech and father against son, the epic showdown will test this fierce but undisciplined team of modern-day ninjas who must learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash their inner power of Spinjitzu.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$20,433,071 (34.5% of total gross)
Legs:2.90 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:47.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,047 opening theaters/4,047 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $79,042,073

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
September 22nd, 2017 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 15th, 2017 (Wide), released as Lego Ninjago filmas (Lithuania)
September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Germany)
September 22nd, 2017 (Wide) (Poland)
September 22nd, 2017 (Wide), released as La Lego Ninjago pelicula (Spain)
Video Release: December 12th, 2017 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for some mild action and rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2489 (Cert #51195), 8/16/2017)
Running Time: 101 minutes
Franchise: Lego
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Dysfunctional Family, Martial Arts, Monster, Ninja, Secret Identity, Super Villains
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Spin-Off
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Lego Systems A/S , Vertigo Entertainment, Animal Logic, Lin Pictures, RatPac Entertainment, Dune Entertainment, Warner Animation Group
Production Countries: United States, Denmark
Languages: English

Synopsis

The battle for Ninjago City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, who are all secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat evil warlord Garmadon, the Worst Guy Ever, who also happens to be Lloyd’s dad. Pitting mech against mech and father against son, the epic showdown will test this fierce but undisciplined team of modern-day ninjas who must learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash their inner power of Spinjitzu.
